raw_consumer_statement: I received acknowledgment thru CFPB that they were looking into the charges that they admitted were false but on XX/XX/XXXX Barclay took {$1400.00} from my bank account electronically without my approval or permission even though I pay by check every month & have for years.I then had to go to my bank & sign paperwork to cancel the transaction.Its been very stressful dealing with this problem & I simply wish to part ways with this company but they are still saying I need to send a copy of my social security card front & back along with drivers license front & back as well to end this.With all that has happened I do not trust this process & have been advised by legal authorities not to provide any of the above information to Barclay based their continued negligence of fraud support on my account & permitting the fraudulent information to remain on my account which has negatively impacted my credit score
